title: X6886-15.1.1.107SP38-OP001PF001AZ-15.1.1.116SP01-OP001PF001AZ_20250729105730
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
X6886-15.1.1.116SP01(OP001PF001AZ)

Fixed Issues:
1. Optimized the transition animation for sliding brightness bar in Outdoor Booster mode.
2. Optimized the display of incoming WhatsApp calls in Game Mode.
3. Enhanced the visual effects of Backlight Effect.
4. Optimized the fingerprint unlocking animation in screen-off scenarios.
5. Optimized Camera for better photography effects in completely dark environments.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XClub forum (https://www.infinix.club) for more information.
